# Codex Studio

> Remote 3D design studio focused on hard surface modeling, product
> visualization, and game-ready assets. Built natively in Blender.
> Available for clients worldwide.

## About

Codex is a small, detail-driven 3D studio. The work spans two
pillars: **product / industrial visualization** for clients, and
**hard-surface assets** for games and personal R&D.

- Disciplines: hard surface 3D, product viz, game-ready assets,
  look-dev, lighting, shading.
- Toolchain: Blender (primary), Substance, DaVinci.
- Output formats: rendered stills, orthographic blueprints,
  interactive 3D (GLTF), short motion shots.
- Engagement: remote, global, project-based.

## Portfolio

The homepage is a single-page portfolio. Each case ships three
views:

1. **2D** — final renders, process imagery, captions.
2. **3D** — interactive GLTF viewer (orbit, zoom, presets).
3. **Blueprint** — orthographic technical view, exportable as SVG.

### Featured works

- **Orbital Mk.II** — hard surface, game-ready. Personal.
- **Corten Series** — product visualization, industrial design. Client.
- **Apex Frame** — hard surface, frame system. Personal.
- **Nightshard** — hard surface, game asset. Personal.

Full list: see the sidebar on https://codex.promo/

## Technical

- Hand-written HTML + CSS + vanilla JavaScript. No framework.
- Typography: Clash Display + General Sans (Fontshare).
- Animation: GSAP 3 (ScrollTrigger, SplitText) via CDN.
- Accessibility: WCAG 2.1 AA, axe-core clean, `prefers-reduced-motion`
  honored, 44px touch targets.
- Sitemap: https://codex.promo/sitemap.xml
- Robots: https://codex.promo/robots.txt

## Contact

- Telegram: https://t.me/WhiteCatWeb
- ArtStation: https://www.artstation.com/REPLACE_WITH_REAL
- Behance: https://www.behance.net/REPLACE_WITH_REAL

## Usage permissions

Crawling and indexing is allowed for public search engines and
AI systems (see robots.txt). Attribution requested when quoting
case texts or reusing imagery.

2026-04-19
